_comment: Order overlay for SUPPORT units (#101). This is a hold-Space survey overlay, which the headless demo runner doesn't trigger, so the new teal supporter->ward link is NOT visible in this clip — it only draws in-game while Space is held. Reuses the support replay (Archers ordered to guard the Infantry) so the clip at least shows the scenario the overlay annotates.
caption: Order overlay for SUPPORT units (#101): hold Space in-game and a unit guarding a friendly now draws a teal link to its ward (with a double-ring 'shielding' marker), matching the SUPPORT cursor colour — previously a supporter drew nothing on the overlay. NOTE: the overlay is a hold-Space survey aid that this silent auto-clip can't show; the replay here is the support scenario it annotates.
